title: Tinkers' Evolution
description: the fresh new tinkers' construct addon
body:
**Tinkers' Evolution** is a [Tinkers' Construct](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct) addon that adds support for myriad materials from various other mods. Unlike other addons of the same ilk, Tinkers' Evolution seeks to tightly integrate the Tinkers' tools with the original mods. For example...

* Tools made of Astral Sorcery materials can be attuned at the attunement altar to provide additional bonuses
* Tools made of Draconic Evolution materials are RF-powered and can be upgraded by fusion crafting
* Tools made of Blood Magic materials draw from the wielder's LP reserves to repair themselves

...and much more! You can find [a list of mod integrations](https://github.com/phantamanta44/tinkers-evolution/) or [a full list of tool materials and traits](https://github.com/phantamanta44/tinkers-evolution/blob/1.12.2/TODO.md) on the mod's GitHub repository page.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IGALuv74/images/5241cd51df90f9647b73375323dd0b8b6252aafc.png)
